speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai. Aaj subah jab se mobile pe termination email dekha hai, lag raha hai sab khatam, par rone baithunga toh agle mahine ki tractor EMI kaun bharega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their duty frame first to show their primary concern for the family is heard.
text: Tumhara pura dhyan abhi is baat par laga hai ki chahe jo ho jaye, parivaar aur us tractor EMI ki zimmedari har haal mein nibhani hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur koi raasta hi nahi hai mere paas. Gaon mein fasal pehle hi kharab ho gayi thi iss baar. Main is sheher mein bas isliye tikka hua tha ki unhe paise bhej sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time and duration of their struggle in the city.
text: Lamba samay beet gaya hai sheher mein akele mehnat karte hue, sirf isliye taaki apne ghar walon ko us fasal ke nuksan se nikal sako.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Bina ruke poora saal nikal diya. Par ab kya karun? Sahukaar roz darwaze pe aata hai gaon mein. Pitaji bahut pareshan hain. Mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai, samajh rahe ho aap?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the implied fear of the consequence if they stop.
text: Darr is baat ka sabse zyada hai ki agar tum rukk gaye, toh gaon mein pitaji ko akele us sahukaar ka samna karna padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Gaon mein izzat hi sab kuch hoti hai. Agar sahukaar ne beizzati kardi panchayat ke samne, toh hum muh dikhane layaq nahi rahenge. Isliye ye naukri bohot zaroori thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question arising from their focus on saving the family's honor to uncover deeper emotional layers.
text: Ye izzat aur parivaar ko bachane ki koshish mein, jab akele apne kamre mein ye termination ka email dekha, toh sabse pehla khayal kya aaya tumhare andar?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Khayal yahi tha ki mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta. Bas ek machine ki tarah dusra rasta dhoondna hoga mujhe, kyunki mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how taking care of relationships leaves no room for their own pain.
text: Apne ghar walon ko us sahukaar se aur beizzati se bachane ki is race ne tumhe khud ki taqleef mehsoos karne ka bhi mauka hi nahi diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Taqleef kya hoti hai wahi bhool gaya hoon main. Do saal se Diwali par bhi gaon nahi gaya. Socha tha is baar EMI clear karke jaunga. Ab toh biradari mein log aur baatein banayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Follow stigma protocol with a short relational restatement ending in a pause.
text: Biradari ke taano ke darr ne tumhe in do saalon mein tyohar par bhi ghar aane se roke rakha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... sach bolun toh andar se poora toot chuka hoon. Kab tak is tarah machine ban kar rahun? Par option hi kya hai, rone se udhaar thodi na chukta hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the hidden emotional toll of Duty-Based coping with financial stress.
text: Lagta hai roz-roz us sahukaar ke baare mein soch kar aur khud ko ek machine banne par majboor karke, andar hi andar tum ek bohot gahri EXHAUSTION mehsoos kar rahe ho jise koi dekh nahi raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul thak gaya hoon bhaiya. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai subah uthun hi nahi, par agle hi pal pitaji ka chehra saamne aa jata hai aur uthna padta hai. Ye bojh uthate uthate saansein phoolne lagi hain meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their exhaustion normally and separate their self-worth from the job loss.
text: Ghar se door rah kar is hadd tak thak jana bilkul swabhavik hai jab aap akele poore parivaar ka bojh utha rahe ho; yaad rakhna ki layoff hona tumhari mehnat ya niyat mein koi kami nahi dikhata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mehnat toh maine bohot ki thi. Night shift bhi lagai over-time ke liye. Par company ne ek line ke email mein sab khatam kar diya. Aur wahan gaon mein logon ko lagta hai sheher mein main aish kar raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers keeping silent about job loss.
text: Pravasi mazdooron aur sheher aakar kaam karne walon mein achanak naukri jane ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi gaon mein ye bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein kamyab dikhne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sach kaha aapne. Yahan har dusra aadmi yahi jhel raha hai khamoshi se. Par ab sawal ye hai ki agla mahina sar par hai. Koi raasta hai kya aage ka ki main is aafat se nikal sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide two clear, actionable options that respect their duty frame.
text: Hum do chhote kadam utha sakte hain abhi. Pehla, apne purane thekedar ya doston ko naye kaam ke liye chota sa text karna, ya dusra, apni aakhri salary ka hisab lagana taaki agle mahine ki EMI ka saaf plan ban sake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Doston ko batane mein thodi sharam aa rahi hai abhi dimaag se. Par haan, salary account mein thode paise aane baaki hain full and final ke. Uska hisab lagaya ja sakta hai chup chap.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide them to calculate their finances step by step right now.
text: Pehle ek kagaz par apni aane wali pending salary likh lo… phir usme se wo tractor EMI aur apne kamre ka kiraya alag kar do… bas itna hi hisab karo aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likh raha hoon. Pending lagbhag 18 hazaar aayega mera. Tractor ki kist 10 hazaar hai... 3 hazaar yahan ka kiraya hai. 5 hazaar phir bhi bachenge. Matlab ek mahina toh nikal jayega araam se bina udhaar liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe showing that understanding the financial runway reduces panic.
text: Ye hisab samne aane se thodi saans mili hogi; jab hum is tarah ke aarthik dabaav mein hote hain, toh dimaag sirf worst-case dikhata hai, par numbers batate hain ki tumhare paas agla kadam sochne ke liye ek poora mahina hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai
text: Wakayi thodi rahat zaroor mili. Dimaag mein bas sahukaar aur uski gaaliyan hi ghoom rahi thi subah se. Main toh unhe bachane ke darr se hi aadha hua ja raha tha. Par mujhe thakne ka koi haq nahi hai, is 5 hazaar mein kharcha chalana padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how the fear of family's reaction clouded their logic.
text: Ghar walo ki chinta aur us sahukaar ke darr ke shor ne tumhara dhyan is ek mahine ke buffer se poori tarah hata diya tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Main hi ekmatra sahara hoon unka. Par chalo, ab lag raha hai ki poore 20-25 din hain mere paas dusri naukri ya thekedar se baat karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask them to plan the next specific action regarding finding work.
text: In aane wale bees dino mein, thekedar ya apne network se naye kaam ke baare mein poochne ki shuruaat tum kaise karna behtar samjhoge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera ek gaon ka dost yahan dusre godown mein thekedar ke under kaam karta hai. Usse WhatsApp message bhej sakta hoon poochne ke liye ki wahan koi jagah khali hai kya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give simple communication options that preserve their dignity.
text: Badiya. Ek chhoti si baat usse message par bhej sakte ho, ya seedhe ye likh sakte ho ki 'mera purana contract khatam ho gaya hai, naya kaam ho toh batana'.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ye contract khatam hone wali line badhiya hai. Usse izzat bhi reh jayegi meri, aur unhe lagega nahi ki mujhe nikal diya gaya hai. Main abhi bhejta hoon usse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how this action protects what they value most.
text: Is tarike se baat rakhne par tumhe andar se tasalli rahegi ki tumhara samman bacha hua hai aur koi ulta-seedha soch kar afwah nahi udayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha bilkul. Bas achanak se pata nahi kya hua, aaj ka hisab lagane ke baad sharir mein bahut zor ki thakan mehsoos ho rahi hai. Subah se bhookh bhi nahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate physical drop after long-held stress is released.
text: Jab itne badhe darr aur parivaar ki tension ko hum mahino tak akele sehte hain, aur phir kuch hisab saaf hota hai, toh adrenaline kam hone par sharir ka thakna aur bhookh lagna puri tarah normal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sayad abhi thoda aaram mang raha hai mera sharir. Pehle kuch kha hi leta hoon bacha hua. Aapne thodi der sun liya toh dimaag kafi halka ho gaya mera, such mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic normalisation of needing to vent.
text: Akele samasyaon ko sehna humare dehat se aaye hue logon ki ek aadat ban jati hai, par jab thoda sa dil halka kar lete hain toh aage ki planning ke liye dimaag shant ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Beshak. Ek hafte baad agar baat nahi bani tab ki chinta tab karunga main. Abhi toh sabse pehle main aaram se apne kamre mein roti khaunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask for one final commitment to self-maintenance.
text: Agle kuch dino tak jab tak naya raasta nahi mil jata, apne is khaane-peene aur aaram ka dhyan rakhne ke liye tum kaunsa chota sa niyam banana chahoge?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi niyam rakhunga ki kam se kam raat ko 6 ghante sone ki koshish karunga. Main koi lohe ki machine nahi hoon, ye baat aaj jaakar samajh aayi hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close by affirming their strength found in acknowledging their humanity.
text: Apne aap ko insaan man-ne ka ye ehsaas, jo apne parivaar ki khatir roz poori jaan lagata hai, sach kahun toh yahi tumhari sabse asali taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai
text: Shehar ki naukri chali gayi par main gaon mein bataye bina wapas khet mein kaam karne nikal gaya hoon kyunki bank ki kist default nahi honi chahiye. Chit fund mein paise doobne ke baad ghar ki saari umeed mujh par hai, isliye main exhaustion ko ignore karke bas pasina baha raha hoon. 'Log kya kahenge' ye darr mujhe sone nahi deta, par kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's duty frame of taking on the entire burden to prevent family shame.
text: Ghar walon ko bina bataye tum wapas khet mein lag gaye kyunki parivaar ki ummeed aur bank ki kist chukana tumhara sabse bada farz ban gaya hai abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ji. Shehar se khali haath lautne ki baat kisko bataun? Bapu ko pata chala toh unka dil toot jayega. Unhone chit fund mein pehle hi sab gawa diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the father's heartbreak if he learns the truth.
text: Bapu ka dil tootne ka darr aur gaon ki baatein, yahi sab soch kar tum akele hi ye sara bojh utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai
text: Bojh toh uthana hi padega na. Main bada beta hoon. Raat din bas yahi lagta hai ki kist kaise niklegi. Kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai, thakne ka hak kahan hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the physical and mental toll of denying oneself the right to be tired.
text: Jab tum kehte ho ki thakne ka hak nahi hai aur lagatar mehnat karni hai, toh andar hi andar ye dabav kaisa mehsoos hota hai tumhari body aur dimaag par?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dimaag toh sunn ho gaya hai. Khet mein dhhoop mein pasina bahaate waqt bas ek hi baat ghoomti hai ki log kya kahenge agar zameen girvi rakhni padi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational pressure and shame associated with losing the land.
text: Biradari aur gaon walon ke taane aur zameen jaane ki sharam, inhi khayalon ne tumhara chain bilkul chheen liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Par mardon ko aisi baatein bolne ki aadat nahi hoti yahan. Kisi se bolunga toh bolenge mard ban, rona band kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter reflection ending in a soft pause, focusing on the duration of carrying this alone.
text: Itne dinon se bina roye is poore dabav ko akele bardasht karte rehna pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai
text: Karna padta hai ji. Shehar ki chhutti bata ke aaya hoon. Kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai. Bas yehi jhooth thoda bhaari pad raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the lie crumbling while trying to maintain the facade.
text: Har roz subah se shaam tak ek jhoothi umeed dikhana aur andar hi andar sab tabah ho jane ke dar mein jeena bahut bhari ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein waqt kat-ta hi nahi. Ek mahina ho gaya hai ye natak karte hue. Bank walon ke message aate hain toh saans atak jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe into the specific fear triggered by the bank messages to uncover the core conflict.
text: Jab bank ka message aata hai aur achanak se saans atakne lagti hai, us waqt dimaag mein sabse bada dar kya hota hai tumhare?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai
text: Yahi dar ki ghar walon ko pata chal gaya toh izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai, par andar se bahut toot raha hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect EXHAUSTION since C5 + Duty_Based coping points to extreme burnout.
text: Lagta hai ki parivaar ki izzat bachane ka aur akele is financial karz ko chukane ka ye lagatar bojh tumhe mentally aur physically puri tarah exhaust kar chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaiya, bilkul thak chuka hoon. Haddein dard karti hain raat ko. Par agle din fir wahi kheti aur wahi chinta. Option kya hai mere paas?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the exhaustion as a culturally normal response to losing a city job and bearing family debt alone.
text: Yeh thakaan aur helplessness bilkul swabhavik hai. Shehar ki naukri jana aur upar se gaon mein akele bank ki kist ka pressure, koi bhi is halat mein exhaust ho jayega. Tumhari himmat tumhari is pareshani se bahut badi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap pehle insaan ho jisse main ye sab khul ke bol pa raha hoon. Gaon mein toh sab ek dusre ke piche baatein banate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote normalizing the hidden struggles of migrant farmers and debt.
text: Hamare gaon dehat mein aise karz aur zimmedari akele chup chap dhone ka pattern bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki biradari mein izzat kam hone ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi bola. Izzat ke chakkar mein hi toh main ghut raha hoon. Sach bol diya toh bapu aur amma ki saari ummeed toot jayegi. Par main theek hona chahta hoon, ye dabav ab saha nahi jaata. Batao main kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 simple, <10 min actionable steps suitable for his rural setting and exhaustion.
text: Jab dimaag itna thak gaya ho, toh do chote practical steps le sakte hain. Pehla, ek paper par aage ke khet ke kharchon ki list banana, taaki kuch clear dikhe. Dusra, raat ko sone se pehle sirf 5 minute khule aangan mein akele baith kar lamba saans lena. Kaunsa abhi theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Hisab kitab toh mujhe aur dara dega sach kahun toh. Wo 5 minute khule aangan mein baithna main aaj raat kar sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide the Seeker step-by-step through the 5-minute breathing exercise in the courtyard.
text: Pehle aaj raat aangan mein ekant mein aaram se baitho... phir sirf aati-jaati saans par apna poora dhyan lagao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main aangan mein baithne ki koshish karunga. Kam se kam us waqt dimag ko 'kist' shabd se door rakhne ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the financial distress as a systemic agricultural and economic issue.
text: Fasal aur economy ke lagatar badalte haalat aur chit fund wale fraud ek bada structural issue hai, ye tumhari khud ki banayi hui pareshani nahi hai. Is poore system mein ek insaan ka dabav mein aana aam baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai
text: Aap baatein toh theek karte ho. Kisan ka beta hoon toh structural endurance hi mera ekmatra sahara hai, ye sach hai par kam se kam ye meri akeli galti nahi hai ye jaan kar thodi shanti mili.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the sense of relief that comes from realizing it is not a personal failure.
text: Apni galti na hone ka ehsaas aur phir bhi ghar ki zimmedari ko poori tarah se nibhane ki lagan, yahi sach thodi rahat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Agar bank manager se restructure ka option mil jaye toh kya meri kist thodi kam ho sakti hai? Mere paas abhi fasal aane mein time hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide factual information about banking guidelines for farmers to reduce panic.
text: Haan, banks ke paas Reserve Bank ke guidelines ke mutabiq kisan aur fasal ke cycle ke aadhar par kist ko aage badhane ya restructure karne ke pravdhan hote hain, jisse penalty aur default se bacha ja sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha... ye mujhe kisi ne bataya hi nahi. Main toh soch raha tha default hua toh seedha gaon walon ke samne zameen ki kurki karne aa jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the intense fear of land seizure blocked him from seeing structural solutions.
text: Gaon walon ke saamne kurki hone ka dar aur izzat jaane ka khayal itna haavi tha jisne tumhe is restructure wale raaste ke baare mein sochne tak nahi diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach hai. Darr insaan ko andha kar deta hai. Kal main chupke se shehar wali branch jaunga jahan mera loan hai aur unse is restructure ke bare mein pata karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational safety choice of going to the city branch quietly.
text: Shehar wali branch chupke se jana taaki gaon mein kisi ko pata na chale aur parivaar ki baatein mehfooz rahein, ye ek samajhdari bhara kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Agar kaam ban gaya, toh ghar walo ko bina tension diye main is fasal ke season tak time nikal lunga. Meri thakan aadhi ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how he plans to frame his conversation to ensure he feels prepared and confident.
text: Jab kal tum manager ke samne baithoge aur restructure ki baat karoge, toh apni is fasal wali situation ko sabse pehle kis tarah samjhane ka socha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main unhe bolunga ki abhi khet mein kaam chal raha hai aur fasal aane mein do mahine hain. Main unhe assure karunga ki main karz chukaunga zaroor.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the responsibility and integrity in his plan to talk to the manager.
text: Manager ko poore imandari se ye batana ki tum apni zimmedari nibhaoge aur fasal aane par hisaab barabar karoge, tumhari is sacchi niyat ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ab yehi umeed hai. Agar theek ho gaya toh shayad kheti mein aur mann lagega. Aaj ka aangan wala task zaroor karunga main sone se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how acting on this new hope helps diminish the overarching fear of social shame.
text: Aaj raat aangan mein shanti se baithna aur kal bank jaane ki nayi umeed, dhire dhire us 'log kya kahenge' wale dar ko aur kamzor kar rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Email aane ke baad dimaag sunn hai, par remittance band hui toh chote bhai ki padhai ruk jayegi aur vehicle loan ka EMI bounce ho jayega. Main thak kar haar nahi maan sakta kyunki mere peeche koi backup nahi hai, bas mera kartavya hai. Sharir jawab de raha hai par ek baap aur beta hone ke naate mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duty and role expectation to validate his immediate pressure to not break down (Lens B).
text: Tumhare upar itni sari zimmedariyan hain ki apna dard mehsoos karne ki jagah, tum khud ko parivaar ke liye ek mazboot sahara banaye rakhne par majboor kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Bhai ki college ki fees deni hai aur babuji ne jo gaadi nikaali thi uska loan bhi mere sir par hai. Agar main kamzor pada toh wahan chula jalana mushkil ho jayega. Mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga, koi aur raasta nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the underlying fear of what happens to his family's reputation and life if the remittance stops (Lens E).
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki email se job jaane ka darr utna bada nahi hai, jitna is baat ka khauf hai ki gaon mein ghar walo ki zindagi achanak ruk jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Haan, unhe lagta hai main yahan city mein mast kama raha hoon. Par ab email dekh kar raat bhar neend nahi aayi. Sharir jawab de raha hai, thak gaya hoon, par mera kartavya mujhe rukne nahi deta. Mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga taaki unhe koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting reflection on the internal toll of strictly adhering to duty without space for processing.
text: Is poore bojh ko akele uthate hue, jab tum khud ko lagatar andar se dabate ho, toh wo sunn dimaag aur thaka hua sharir tumse kya keh raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sharir kehta hai ki ab himmat nahi bachi. Subah uthne ka dil nahi karta. Par phir yaad aata hai ki agle mahine EMI bounce hui toh babuji ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Main unka bada beta hoon, mere peeche koi backup thodi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational dynamic where he feels reduced to a financial provider for his parents and brother (Lens C).
text: Babuji ki izzat aur chote bhai ke sapno ka saara bhar tumne apne kandho par liya hua hai, jisse tumhara apne aap se rishta sirf ek kamane wale zarirye ka ban kar reh gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahu toh main sirf ek ATM machine ban gaya hoon. Par gaon se yahan isliye hi toh aaya tha. Agar main hi rone lagunga toh remittance kon bhejo ga? Mujhe darr lag raha hai ki sab kuch hath se nikal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledged the prolonged timeline of his financial sacrifice since his migration to the city (Lens D).
text: Jab se tum gaon chhod kar is shehar aaye ho, tab se lagataar din raat ek karke sirf ghar ke liye paise bhej rahe ho, bina ek din bhi khud ke liye ruke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paanch saal ho gaye ghar dhang se gaye hue. Aur ab ye naukri jaane ka email... andar se bilkul tut chuka hoon. Ek taraf lag raha hai ab aur nahi khinchega, doosri taraf ghar ka kartavya hai jo meri gardan pakad ke khada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the deep exhaustion hiding beneath his duty-based coping mechanism as he named his core conflict.
text: Lagta hai ghar ki in zimmedariyon ke beech apni poori takat laga dene ke baad, ek bahut gehri thakaan aur thodi si lachari hai jise tumne itne saalo se bahar nahi aane diya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... thakaan toh bahut hai. Par kisi se bol thodi sakta hoon. Bada beta hu, mard ban ke rona allowed nahi hai. Log kahenge ki iska shehar mein rehna bekar gaya, parivaar ko nahi sambhal paya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirrored the stigma and gender expectation forcing him to hide his exhaustion, pausing to give space (Lens B).
text: Bade bete ka taj pehanne ke baad, apni kamzori dikhana ya madad maangna tumhare liye ek tana sunne jaisa darr ban gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa hi hai. Yahan akele room mein khali dimaag baitha rehta hoon. Darr lagta hai ki EMI bounce hui toh gaon wale taane marenge. Aur ab bank balance bhi khatam hone wala hai. Bahut helplessness mehsoos hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his helplessness as culturally normal for migrant breadwinners, separating his worth from the job loss.
text: Yeh akelapan aur darr mehsoos karna bilkul aam baat hai. Apne ghar walo se door rehkar, akele kamane walo pe jab achanak financial bojh badhta hai toh koi bhi helpless feel karega, aur naukri ka khatre me hona tumhari mehnat par sawaal nahi uthata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad. Par meri niyat chahe kitni bhi achi ho, agar paise nahi gaye toh EMI aur chote ki padhai ruk jayegi. Yeh system aisa hi hai. Hum jaise kamane walo ki koi value nahi hai, sirf hamari remittance ki value hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers to normalize the structural reality and reduce his personal guilt.
text: Bahar shehar mein kaam karne wale bade beto ke sath ye achanak se nikal diye jane wala bojh bohut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko izzat bachani hoti hai aur khud ko bada mard dikhana hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Sab bas chup chaap kheenchte rehte hain, meri tarah. Par ab kya karoon? Rone se toh EMI pay nahi hogi. Mujhe ab sach mein rasta nikalna hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalize seeking temporary relief from banks without adding personal failure stigma.
text: Achanak job sankat aane par, banks aur institutions aksar aisi temporary halat me relief ke raaste dete hain, yeh loan system ka ek standard hissa hota hai aur isme koi sharam ki baat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha? Mujhe nahi pata tha. Mujhe lagta tha ki EMI ek din bhi late hui toh bank wale seedha ghar aakar badnami kar denge. Vehicle loan hai toh gaadi utha lenge gaon se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered practical, low-effort options to manage the immediate loan fear without adding new obligations.
text: Agar tumhara dimaag thoda shant ho, toh hum do chote kadam utha sakte hain: ya toh hum loan wali company ke customer care ka number nikal kar restructure policy padh lein, ya bank ko ek chota message draft karke bhej dein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Message bhej kar shayad thodi mohlat mil jaye? Bhai ki fees ke liye bhi college mein thoda time maang sakta hoon shayad. Customer care wala kaam pehle karte hain, batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the bank communication into a highly manageable, step-by-step micro-task.
text: Pehle phone me bank ka app khol kar customer care email id nikalo... phir ek choti line likho ki temporary job issue ki wajah se mujhe kuch din ka extension chahiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Theek hai, main unki ID nikalta hoon app se. Yeh mail karne se kam se kam mujhe ek confirmation toh rahega ki maine unhe bata diya tha pehle hi. Mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga par aise practical kaam karne se thoda bojh halka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how taking a small step mitigates the catastrophic fear associated with defaulting on the loan (Lens E).
text: Ek chota sa formal step lene se gaon mein achanak shock milne ka wo darr sach mein thoda kam ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai. EMI bounce ka notice seedha babuji ke phone pe jaata toh unka heart fail ho jata. Us darr ne hi mera dimaag sunn kar rakha tha pichle do din se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured him that taking proactive steps despite fear is a true mark of his capability.
text: Tumne is dar ke baawajood jo himmat dikhayi hai wo tareef ke kabil hai. Financial crisis ke is dar me aksar log theher jate hain, par tumhara aise step lena prove karta hai ki ek bura waqt tumhari takat kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Chalo, customer care ko mail draft kar diya. Agla kaam mujhe nayi job ke liye pata karna hoga apne contractors se, par aaj raat lagta hai kam se kam neend toh aayegi thodi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided another very small, specific task to maintain momentum for tomorrow without causing overwhelm.
text: Kal subah ke liye bhi ek bahut hi aasan option rakh sakte hain: sirf 5 minute nikal kar apne pehchan wale do thekedar ya dosto ko bas 'looking for work' ka ek chota message likh dena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh sahi rahega. Ek sath sab karne jaunga toh fir se ghabrahat hogi. Sirf do logo ko message bhej dunga kal subah uthte hi. Baaki dekha jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighted his shift towards a more sustainable and structured timeframe for managing his tasks (Lens D).
text: Sab kuch ek hi din mein niptane ki jagah, ab tum apne kaam aur dimaag ko ek samay par ek hi hisse mein baant rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Warna ab tak toh main kal ki chinta karke aur agle 6 mahine ka darr soch soch kar marr raha tha. Aaj raat ko chula jalane ke liye lakkdi jama karne jaisa hisaab laga raha hoon main, step by step.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected his shift towards a more mature and compassionate relationship with his own duties (Lens C).
text: Ab tumhara khud se rishta ek darr se bhare kartavya ka na reh kar, ek samajhdar aur thehrav wale insaan ka ban raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bol rahe ho. Hosla rakhna padega. Ghar walo ne mujhpar bohut umeed lagayi hai. Unhe niraash nahi kar sakta, par ab khud ko mar kar bhi kaam nahi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his exhaustion as normal in the context of economic distress and separated his worth from the outcome.
text: Bilkul, apni in thakaan aur feelings ko manna ek natural baat hai. Bahar shehar me akele is economic dabaaw se guzarna aasan nahi hai, par ek email tumhari us barso ki mehnat ki keemat ko tay nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Kash ye baat mujhe pehle samajh aa jati. Main bas andha ho kar bhaag raha tha aur soch raha tha ki mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga, bina soche ki pathar bhi toh aakhir toot hi sakta hai na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how his rigid adherence to being a strong son blinded him to his own basic human needs (Lens B).
text: Ek zimmedar bete ki tarah mazboot rehne ki lagan mein, tum is sacchai ko dekh hi nahi paye the ki ek insaan hone ke naate thakna bhi tumhara haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haq ki toh aadat nahi hai, par aaj aapse baat kar ke bohut boj halka ho gaya. Lag raha tha main akela hi ghut raha hoon, par ab rasta thoda saaf dikh raha hai aage ka. Dhanyawad is sahare ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided final validation, reinforcing his inner strength and humanity entirely independently of his financial crisis.
text: Tumhare is safar aur us lachari ke aage haar na manne pe waqai me garv hai. EMI aur debt ki pareshaniya aati hain, par in sabse upar tumhari insaniyat aur mehnat hai jo kisi bank balance se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Meri kisan identity mujhe har haal mein parivaar ka pet paalne ki hidayat deti hai. Mujhe bas bina ruke endure karte rehna hai, kyunki breakdown karna gunah lagta hai. Subah termination letter mila aur sab khatam ho gaya. Jo thode paise the, wo savings wiped out ho chuki hain. Sahukaar ka vyaj aur ye debt spiral itna gehra hai ki ab kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge mild risk with a warm normalising line, then mirror their duty frame that prevents them from feeling pain.
text: Aapke upar parivaar ko sambhalne ki aisi badi zimmedari hai ki achanak kaam chale jane ke baad bhi, aapko lagta hai ki aapko rukne ya thakne ka koi haq nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, gaon mein sahukaar ko jawab dena hai. Agar main ruk gaya toh khet aur ghar sab bik jayega. Rukne ka toh sawaal hi paida nahi hota, bhale hi andar se jaan nikal rahi ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens D to reflect the continuous, unyielding duration of their burden.
text: Lagaataar is bojh ko uthate hue aur sahukaar ke karz ka darr aapko har waqt aage badhne par majboor kar raha hai, bina ek pal ki saans liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Saans lene ki fursat kahan hai babuji. Raat din vyaj ka darr satata hai. Sochta hoon chhota mota mazdoori kar loon, par breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, bache kya khayenge agar baap toot gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens E to softly name the implied fear of their family starving if they fall apart.
text: Aapko andar se darr lag raha hai ki agar aap thoda sa bhi kamzor pade, toh bachon ka guzar-basar kaise hoga aur sab bikhar jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere maa baap ne bhi yahi kiya, apna khoon paseena ek karke humein bada kiya. Ab meri baari hai. Par ye debt spiral ka fanda gala ghot raha hai. Ek ajeeb si thakan hai jo khatam hi nahi hoti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question arising from their description of constant exhaustion to move deeper.
text: Jab aap is gale ghotne wale bojh aur thakan ke beech akele khade hote hain, toh us waqt aapke mann mein sabse zyada kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mann karta hai ki kahin door chala jaun jahan koi udhaari na ho. Par phir lagta hai ki main kaisa mard hoon jo apni zimmedari se bhagna chahta hai. Ye sab batane mein bhi sharam aati hai, gaon wale sochenge kitna kamzor hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter Lens C restatement, ending with a soft pause.
text: Aap parivaar ki khatir sab kuch akele seh rahe hain, aur apne mann ka bojh dikhane mein bhi aapko darr hai ki log judge karenge...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Log toh judge karenge hi, biradari mein naam kharab hoga. Par andar se main bilkul khokhla ho gaya hoon. Bas breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, yahi soch ke chal raha hoon bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying EXHAUSTION appropriate for C4/C5 + Duty_Based coping.
text: Lagta hai ki is sab ke beech ek bohot gehri thakan aur exhaustion hai jo aapko andar se daba rahi hai, kyunki lagta hai ki thoda bhi ruke toh parivaar toot jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, niraash hone se zyada bhooke marne ki naubat aa jayegi. Jab se termination letter mila hai, neend udh gayi hai. Pura din bas ye hisaab lagata hoon ki kisko kitna paisa dena baki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their overthinking as normal in this severe financial distress, separating their worth from the job loss.
text: Kisi bhi insaan ke liye aisi achanak aayi musibat aur udhaari ke bojh mein overthink karna aur thak jana bilkul natural hai. Akele parivaar ko aise paalna himmat ka kaam hai, aur achanak kaam jana aapki mehnat par sawal nahi uthata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baatein himmat toh de rahi hain. Par reality yahi hai ki jeb khali hai. Sahukaar ka aadmi darwaze par aayega toh main apni kaabiliyat thodi dikhaunga usko. Izzat toh mitti mein mil jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about farmer/wage-worker debt to reduce their isolation and stigma.
text: Main samajh sakta hoon, hamare samaj mein kisan aur mazdoor parivaaron mein karz ke jaal ka ye pattern bohot aam hai—sirf aapke saath nahi, lekin izzat ke darr se koi khulkar is bojh ke baare mein bolta nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Sab andar hi andar ghut rahe hain. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai meri saari umar bas is udhaari chukane mein hi nikal jayegi. Zindagi bachi hi kahan hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens B to mirror how their entire life purpose feels reduced to paying off debt.
text: Aisa lagne laga hai ki aapki puri pehchaan aur zindagi ka maqsad sirf apne parivaar ke is karz aur bojh ko uthane tak simat kar reh gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi lagta hai. Par mujhe is ghutan se nikalna hai. Mera dimaag fatne ko ho raha hai. Ab kya karoon ki kam se kam sochne samajhne ki shakti wapas aaye aur main naya kaam dhoond saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe, normalizing their cognitive freeze as a structural response, not a personal failing.
text: Aaj kal ke halaat mein job market ka girna aur karz ki wajah se dimaag ka is tarah sunn pad jana ek structural pareshani hai. Yeh koi personal fail hona nahi hai, balki is mahaul ka asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur bhi logon ki naukri gayi hai aas paas, par mera debt spiral bohot gehra hai. Mujhe kuch rasta batao, kaise shant karun is dimaag ko abhi. Kaam toh dhoondna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 small, accessible options to ground themselves before searching for work.
text: Hum abhi do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh aap agle paanch minute ke liye aankh band karke lambi saans lene par dhyan dein, ya bas ek glass thanda paani peekar kuch der asmaan ki taraf dekhein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aankh band karunga toh wahi sahukaar ka chehra dikhega. Paani peekar thodi der asmaan dekhne wala thik lag raha hai. Bas panch minute ka toh time nikal hi sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk them step-by-step through the chosen grounding exercise.
text: Chaliye, pehle yeh karo ki ek glass paani le aao… phir aaram se baith kar usko piyo aur bas upar asmaan ko dekho, kuch aur mat socho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Paani pee raha hoon. Thandi hawa lag rahi hai. Dimaag mein jo ek dum se bhari pan tha, wo halka sa kam hua lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens D to mirror the temporary relief from their continuous anxiety.
text: Thodi der ke liye is tarah rukne se, us lagataar chalne wali bechaini mein aapko halki si raahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Haan babuji. Breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, par shayad aise do minute ruk kar saans lene ko breakdown nahi kehte. Ye toh zaroori lag raha hai thik se sochne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens B to reinforce that self-care is a necessary tool for fulfilling their duty.
text: Aapko ab yeh samajh aa raha hai ki khud ko thoda aaram dena actually aapko aage apne parivaar ki zimmedari uthane mein aur madad karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Agar main hi gir gaya chakkar kha kar, toh sahukaar ko toh paise nahi milenge, ulta mere parivaar pe aafat aa jayegi. Par dar abhi bhi lagta hai aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the lingering fear about the future despite their newfound clarity.
text: Lagta hai ki himmat jutane ke baad bhi, aage aane wale kal ka aur us karz ka ek darr abhi bhi mann ke kisi kone mein baitha hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wo toh jab tak udhaari poori nahi chukegi, tab tak rahega. Par ab main thoda theek se soch paa raha hoon. Nayi jagah majdoori ya naukri pochni padegi logo se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their practical thinking and tie it back to their strong farmer identity.
text: Apne halaat ko itni saaf nazar se dekh pana aur agle kadam ke baare mein soch pana aapki badi taqat hai. Aise halaat mein practical soch rakhna aapki asli kisan identity ko dikhata hai, jo haar nahi maanti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat sahi boli aapne. Hum mitti se jude log hain, itni jaldi tut-te nahi. Par is darr ko akele jhelna bada mushkil ho gaya tha aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens C to mirror the relational burden of carrying everything alone in silence.
text: Akele apne balbute par is mushkil ko uthana aur bina kisi ko bataye dard sehna waqai bohot bhari ho gaya tha aapke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kisi se bol nahi pata, izzat ka sawaal hai na. Par aapse baat karke thoda aaram mila hai. Abhi kal subah uth ke pehle kaam dhoondhne nikalta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer one last systemic reframe to reinforce that the debt loop is a market flaw, not a personal flaw.
text: Yeh dhyan rakhna ki market ki condition utaar-chadaav wali hoti hai aur karz ka ye chakkar vyawastha ki kami ka nateeja hai, aapki mehnat ka nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Baat samajh raha hoon. Main sirf apna karm kar sakta hoon, baaki toh jo halaat hain unse ladna hi padega. Breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, isliye main bas ladaai jaari rakhunga, par thodi samajhdari se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens E to highlight that they are moving past the fear of failure towards proactive steps.
text: Ab aap us nakami ke darr se aage badhkar, khud ko sambhalte hue apne parivaar ke liye naye raaste nikalne ke liye taiyaar ho rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kal subah se nayi shuruaat karni hai. Raat ko ab shayad thodi neend aa jaye mujhe. Shukriya sunne ke liye, mera dimaag halka kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the return of hope and relief as they prepare to rest.
text: Mujhe sun kar bohot acha lag रहा hai ki ab aapke andar ek umeed jag rahi hai aur aap aane wali raat ko thodi behtar neend ki taraf badh rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai
text: Naukri chali gayi hai aur agle hafte us home loan ki kist bharni hai. Samajh nahi aa raha aage kya hoga, par rukne ka option hi nahi hai mere paas kyunki poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai. Unki shaan banaye rakhne ke liye bas bina thake ladte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the primary duty and role frame that the Seeker opened with.
text: Aapke upar bohot badi zimmmedari hai, aur job jaane ke baad bhi aap khud ke baare mein sochne se pehle un kiston aur parivaar ke aage ki saftey ke baare mein soch rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sab sambhal lenge
text: Karna hi padega na. 40 ki umar mein ab kahan jaunga pata nahi, par 'structural endurance' hi meri pehchaan hai. Kal raat baith kar savings check kar raha tha, hisaab laga raha tha ki kitne mahine ka kharcha bacha hai. Sab sambhal lenge kisi tarah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time and duration aspect of the struggle and the long road ahead.
text: Is age mein achanak se yeh sab calculate karna, aur aage aane wale mahino ka hisaab lagana waqai ek lamba aur thaka dene wala process lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai
text: Haan, aur sabse badi dikkat yeh hai ki main kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta ghar pe. Sab immediately panick kar jayenge. Main unka sabse strong pillar hoon. Aise weak thodi dikh sakta hoon jab poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a gentle open question after two restatements to prompt deeper disclosure about masking.
text: Akele yeh poora sach apne tak rakhna, aur baahar se bilkul strong dikhte rehne ki koshish karna, aapko andar se kaisa mehsoos kara raha hai is waqt?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: sab sambhal lenge
text: Kuch theek se feel karne ka time kahan hai mere paas. Bas lagta hai ek machine ban gaya hoon. Par kabhi kabhi saans atakne lagti hai jab bank ke automated messages aate hain kist ke liye. Phir apne aap ko bolta hoon, sab sambhal lenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the softly implied fear behind the bank messages and the potential consequences.
text: Bank ke messages dekh kar ek pal ke liye woh saans atak jana, jaise shayad agar yeh sab nahi sambhla toh aage kya hoga, yeh khayal darr paida karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: izzat
text: Wahi toh darr hai. Bachon ki fees, wife ki expectations... agar sach mein default ho gaya toh kya izzat reh jayegi hamari society mein? Mujhse apni hi nazron mein girna dekha nahi jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a short relational restatement and a soft pause.
text: Aapke apno ki nazron mein aur society mein jo ek izzat hai, aap usse kisi bhi keemat par tootne nahi dena chahte...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai
text: Bilkul nahi. Maine saalo mehnat ki hai is position ko banane ke liye. Ab achanak lag raha hai jaise sab haath se phisal raha hai. Poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai, aur main bas blank aur sunn feel kar raha hoon andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict and the exhaustion hidden beneath the duty frame.
text: Lagta hai ek taraf parivaar ke liye bina ruke hero banne ki duty hai, aur doosri taraf andar hi andar itni thakan aur numbness hai jise aap baahar aane nahi de sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad yeh thakan hi hai. Pehli baar life mein itna akela aur exhausted lag raha hai. Kabhi socha nahi tha 40s mein yeh din dekhna padega, jahan apne hi ghar mein raat ko chup kar EMI ka hisaab lagana pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the exhaustion for breadwinners in metro spaces and separating worth from the job outcome.
text: Yeh jo akele chhup kar tension lena aur exhausted feel karna hai, yeh bilkul natural hai. Hamare yahan breadwinners aksar apne struggles chupate hain taaki ghar wale safe feel karein. Aapki worth aur aapki mehnat is job loss se kam nahi ho jati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Hum aadmiyon ko sikhaya hi yahi jata hai ki rona mana hai aur bas ghar chalane ke liye paise laate raho. Par abhi thoda relief mil raha hai yeh sach bol kar. Kisi se toh openly kaha maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to show that masking distress is a structural burden, not a personal failing.
text: Aapke jaise experienced professionals mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko society ke saamne ek strong aur independent image banaye rakhni hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi strong image. Par ab purely practical sochna hoga. Aise bas chup chap baithne se ya thakan feel karne se toh EMIs pay nahi honge na. Dimag toh chalana padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the return to the duty/role frame as he shifts gears towards problem-solving.
text: Ab aap ek step aage badh kar wapas apne us provider wale problem-solving mode mein aana chah rahe hain, taaki aage ke financial raaste tay kiye ja sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna hi padega bhai. Par focus kaise karoon? LinkedIn kholta hoon toh frustration hoti hai. Log itne successful hain aur meri naukri achanak chali gayi. Ekdum overwhelming lag raha hai, samajh nahi aa raha kahan se shuru karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the structural reality of the corporate job market to reduce personal blame.
text: Job market ke is phase mein doosron ko dekh kar overwhelmed feel karna ek aam baat hai. Aaj kal layoffs ek structural issue ban gaye hain corporate duniya ke, yeh aapki kaabiliyat ya saalon ki mehnat par koi sawaal nahi uthata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat mujhe apne aap ko baar baar yaad dilani padegi. Abhi main theek hona chahta hoon, aur practical steps lena chahta hoon. Batao kya karoon main abhi se? Kuch clear rasta dikhao taaki thoda burden kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, structured steps that align with his logistical mindset without adding emotional burden.
text: Do choti cheezein kar sakte hain jo shayad aapko clarity dein. Ek, aaj din mein sirf 20 minute alag nikal kar apne emergency funds ka hisaab ek paper pe likhein. Ya doosra, apna resume sirf ek baar update karne ki shuruwaat karein, bina kisi pressure ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Resume update karna bahut lamba aur thakane wala kaam lag raha hai abhi. Yeh 20 minute paper pe hisaab likhne wala step thoda feasible lag raha hai. Dimag se nikal kar digits paper pe aayenge toh shayad uncertainty kam ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step to keep it manageable.
text: Pehle ek blank paper aur pen lijiye. Phir us par agle 2 mahine ki sabse zaroori EMI aur fixed kharche likhiye. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye, uske aage ka abhi nahi sochna hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai
text: Theek hai, purani diary nikal li hai maine. Ek jagah clear hisaab hoga toh har waqt darr nahi lagega shayad. Sab sambhal lenge aakhir, karna toh hai hi kyunki poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief of managing the timeline without taxing his mental energy.
text: Is ek chote kadam se aapka aage ka thoda waqt organized ho jayega, aur aapko har ghante apne dimaag mein woh calculations karke apne aap ko thakana nahi padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh thik rahega. Par pata hai, meri biwi ko bhi shaq ho raha hai aaj kal. Main subah jaldi uth kar nikal jata hoon jaise office ja raha hoon, par poora din society ke bahar wale park mein baithta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a warm normalising line before mirroring the relational strain of hiding his reality.
text: Ghar walon ko pareshan na karne ke liye log aksar apne dukh akele jhelte hain. Park mein akele waqt bitana shanti toh deta hoga, par unse yeh sach chhupana aur akele bojh uthana aap par kaafi bhari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut bhari. Ek do baar park ki bench pe akele baith ke aankh bhar aayi thi meri kal. 40 saal ka professional aadmi, jiska career theek tha, ab akele public park mein ro raha hai... ajeeb lagta hai na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the emotional release as a necessary and deeply human response to immense pressure.
text: Rona bilkul ajeeb nahi hai, yeh ek aam insaan ki tarah react karna hai. Itne dino se lagatar strong bane rehne aur bina thake chalne ki koshish ke baad, akele mein aankhon ka bhar aana ek dam normal hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad isliye main andar se itna numb feel kar raha tha. Aansuo ko jabran rok raha tha kyunki main hero hoon apni family ka. Par hero bhi toh aakhir insaan hi hota hai. Chalo, theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the consequence of forcing himself to be the unbreakable hero.
text: Aapko lagta tha ki us hero ki shaan aur image ko bachane ke liye aapko har emotion ko dabana padega, warna kahin woh strong pillar kamzor na dikh jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly yahi feeling thi. Par abhi, thoda clear lag raha hai dimag. Yeh diary wala step waqai acha hai. Mai apne funds accurately tally kar loonga, phir dekhte hain exactly kitne mahine ka runway bacha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty-focused problem solving and how it serves his family's safety.
text: Apne runway aur budget ko paper par saamne rakh kar, aap aage ke mahino ke liye ek majboot plan tayyar kar lenge jo aapki family ki safety ko pakka karega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek baar runway numbers mein clear ho jaye toh thoda confidence wapas aayega phir se interview dene ke liye. Waqt lagega par I will bounce back. Aise khali nahi baith sakta main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the time needed to recover energy after a structural setback like a layoff.
text: Bouncing back mein waqt aur mental energy dono lagte hain. Yeh job hunt ek lamba process ho sakta hai, aur isme apni battery ko dhyan mein rakhna bhi practical planning ka hi ek hissa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Battery recharge hogi tabhi toh confidence se nayi naukri dhundh paunga. Soch raha hoon aaj raat apni wife ko thoda hint dekar baat karne ki koshish karunga. Ekdum poora sach nahi, par halka sa idea doonga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational shift of inviting his wife to share the burden.
text: Apni wife ke sath thoda sa yeh reality share karna, aap dono ke beech us bojh ko halka kar dega, aur aapko unki taraf se bhi ek support mil payega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai
text: Support toh degi woh, main hi faltu mein overthink kar raha tha izzat aur shaan ko lekar. Chalo, main abhi jaakar pehle woh list banata hoon. Poora khandaan meri taraf dekh raha hai, par shayad ab unke saath milkar bhi face kiya ja sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his progress from isolated endurance to shared problem-solving.
text: Aapne akele sab sambhalne ke pressure se nikal kar, ab saath milkar aage badhne ka jo yeh nazariya banaya hai, yeh waqai kabile tareef hai. Aap apni family ke liye ek bahut practical aur himmat wala kadam utha rahe hain.
